prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame

description: add counting methodology and partial visibility
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame. Count each distinct individual separately, including those partially visible at the edges of the frame. Report the current count even if it has not changed.

description: always report exact count, check edges/occlusion
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame. Always report the exact count, even if zero. Look carefully for people who may be partially occluded or at the edges.

description: emphasize updating count on changes including to zero
prompt: Count the number of people visible in the frame. Update the count whenever it changes, including changes to zero.
